Usage:
  grabbit [command]

grab those images!

Available Commands:
  command2   another command
  command3   another command
  grab       do the grabbity grabbity
  repl       Start a REPL to interactively run commands
  version    Print version

Additional Commands:
  completion   Print shell completion scripts
  config       Change grabbit's config
  section2     another section
  section3     another section

Use "grabbit [command] --help" for more information about a command.
